reason: TEST_SPEC.md Round 1 is structurally and semantically sound as the P2 single-source-of-truth catalog. Every FR has named test cases with TRUE-form concrete Inputs (key=value), a Sub-assertions table per FR with rule_id/predicate/applies_to triples, the NFR Pattern Activation table correctly flags NP-04/NP-06/NP-10/NP-13/NP-15 and negates 10 irrelevant patterns with rationales, architecture-risk triggers (NP-13 io/store.py concurrency; NP-15 runner/runner.py subprocess timeout) are correctly forced into tests/integration/ via Cross-Cutting § Integration, classification labels (DATA_ENTITY/STATE_MACHINE/API_ENDPOINT/INFRASTRUCTURE/SECURITY_CONTROL/INTEGRATION) are assigned per FR, and the Summary table reconciles 19 pytest tc_ids + 1 benchmark + static + chaos per TEST_INVENTORY.yaml v1.5.0.
